reason: Check global invariants: typed RVV authority, no descriptor/source-front-door authority, and no runtime claims without ssh rvv evidence.
Check widening conversion selected-body realization owner, provider preflight, fail-closed direct pre-realized route, and stale authority rules.
Check common EmitC remains neutral and consumes provider-built TCRVEmitCLowerableRoute only.
Check focused C++/lit evidence and conversion/SEW policy expectations.
Check RVV-specific changes stay plugin-local and do not add core semantic branches.
Check no high-level or core compute boundary drift was introduced.
